test_command: pnpm typecheck (web+api) + vitest run (root 82 files) + pnpm --filter @quanqn/web exec vitest run (web-only) + browser AC-7/AC-8
notes: All ACs pass. Root vitest: 82 test files, 774 tests, 0 failures. Typecheck: 0 errors (web+api). Browser: /evolution loads with h1 '进化中心', cold-start UI shows exact AC-8 text '暂无 insight · 等累计 5 条反馈后自动生成'. Web-only vitest 2 pre-existing failures (Generate h1 + History h1 Router context) NOT introduced by US-005 — confirmed present at US-003 commit state before US-005. Evolution-specific tests (h1 + empty state) both pass. AC-4 approved deviation: $queryRaw used instead of prisma.groupBy because DATE_TRUNC not natively supported by groupBy; output shape {date,total,good,satisfactionRate}[] matches AC spec.
